title: StressObservation
description: Raw result from the M2 Stress and Evaluation Engine battery. Authority: OBSERVATIONAL ONLY. Must not suggest mitigations, reference tiers, or infer risk state. Observational-evidence contract supporting Invariant 3 (Evidence-First).

stress_type.description: Canonical stress test classification. Values sourced from VALID_STRESS_TYPES constant.

severity_score.description: Raw severity measurement. No tier mapping at this layer.

reproducibility_hash.description: Hash of stress inputs enabling reproducibility. Required. Supports Invariant 4 (Reconstructability).

context.description: Free-text context about stress execution conditions.
